title: tragia interrupta
intro: Tragia interrupta, also known as the interrupted spurge or Tragia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tragia interrupta include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions and infections. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, and its leaves and roots are also used in herbal preparations.
